name: docx_delete
description: Delete a single paragraph by anchor or a contiguous range like 'P14..P16'. With track_changes on, deletion becomes a redline rather than physical removal. Get anchors from docx_search or docx_read first.

range.description: Paragraph range like 'P14..P16'. Provide anchor or range, not both.

author.description: Revision author when track_changes is true. Defaults from environment.
